validation_velocity.validation_model: Landing page + pre-sale + 10 customer interviews + 1 paid cohort test
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 5 qualified leads reach checkout or paid deposit intent and at least 2 commit within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: Paid traffic and outreach fail to produce at least 2 qualified checkout or deposit signals in the test window.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: Protocol-derived from segment, approval-route complexity, buyer motion, and current validation/citation gaps.
validation_velocity.notes: validation queue severity 4; citation status ready; regulatory route present

demand_pull.derivation_basis: Screenshots confirm a strong global OET exam keyword ecosystem on oet.com, but they do not show owned distribution or Luxembourg-local traction. Added latest SEMrush scorecard sync.
demand_pull.notes: Observed in screenshots from db=US: oet.com ranks heavily on oet, oet sample test, oet result, occupational english test sample, and oet practice test. This proves searchable exam demand exists in the reference market, but most visible pull is branded and controlled by the official domain. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope missing (missing). No anchor query volume is captured yet. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope reference (fit). Anchor query volume sum 920, max anchor volume 590, capture count 3. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope reference (fit). Anchor query volume sum 920, max anchor volume 590, capture count 3. Lane keyword count 25 with 4 P1 terms. Top follow-up terms: oet preparation material, oet preparation course, oet preparation courses, oet preparation materials, how long does it take to prepare for oet. Latest SEMrush scorecard sync: scope reference (fit). Anchor query volume sum 920, max anchor volume 590, capture count 3. Lane keyword count 25 with 4 P1 terms. Top follow-up terms: oet preparation material, oet preparation course, oet preparation courses, oet preparation materials, oet exam sample test.

regulatory_context.derivation_basis: Derived from confirmed regulatory requirements, approval entities, and current contradiction/risk density in the evidence-backed card.
regulatory_context.notes: 2 confirmed regulatory requirements in current card; 1 high-severity risk flags remain in the current card

semrush_snapshot.serp_feature_notes: The captured OET market is strong but branded. The official domain owns the clearest traffic-bearing queries.
semrush_snapshot.traffic_analytics_notes: Use OET screenshots from db=US to validate keyword structure and exam demand, not to infer easy CAC or local Luxembourg pull.

collapsed_scores.confidence_reason: Market evidence scope is reference with scope fit fit. 3 anchor captures contribute to this scorecard sync. Primary evidence database: US.

market_evidence.derivation_basis: Synced from the latest SEMrush-derived product market scorecard, which combines normalized keyword captures, product-market mapping, and scoped local/cross-border/reference evidence rules.
market_evidence.next_research_step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks
market_evidence.notes: Current SEMrush evidence matches the expected scope for this product (reference). Evidence database: US. Captured 3/3 anchor families with total local query volume 920 and max anchor volume 590. Lane rollup contains 25 deduplicated keywords, including 4 P1 terms. Current watchlist domains: oet.com, e2language.com, google.com, apple.com, cambridgeenglish.org. Top follow-up keywords: oet preparation material (P2, vol 70), oet preparation course (P2, vol 50), oet preparation courses (P2, vol 50), oet preparation materials (P2, vol 50), oet exam sample test (P1, vol 260). Next step: refine WTP/CAC with keyword overview and price checks.
